exercises.starterCode:
with open("data/students.csv") as file:
    for line in file:
        print(line.strip())

# Keep the raw-file preview above as your starting point.
# Next, write clean_row(line) so one row becomes a cleaned dictionary.
def clean_row(line):
    # Split the row, clean the name, and convert the score to int.
    pass

with open("data/students.csv") as file:
    first_row = file.readline()

# Print the cleaned first row dictionary.
print(clean_row(first_row))

solutionFiles.content:
with open("data/students.csv") as file:
    first_row = file.readline()

name, score = first_row.split(",")
print(f"{name.strip().title()}:{score.strip()}")
